inputs.label: Lights Out Time (decimal hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time when worker turns off lights and attempts to sleep (e.g., 22.5 for 22:30)

businessContext_i18n.en: Time when worker turns off lights and attempts to sleep (e.g., 22.5 for 22:30)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşçinin ışıkları kapatıp uyumaya çalıştığı saat (ör. 22.5, 22:30 için)
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, zu der der Arbeiter das Licht ausschaltet und versucht zu schlafen (z.B. 22,5 für 22:30)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heure à laquelle le travailleur éteint les lumières et tente de dormir (ex. 22,5 pour 22h30)

inputs.label: Worker Age
inputs.businessContext: Worker's age in years; older age may increase sleep latency

businessContext_i18n.en: Worker's age in years; older age may increase sleep latency
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşçinin yıl cinsinden yaşı; ileri yaş uykuya dalma süresini artırabilir
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Arbeiters in Jahren; höheres Alter kann die Einschlafzeit verlängern
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du travailleur en années ; un âge avancé peut augmenter la latence d'endormissement

inputs.label: Caffeine Intake Before Bed
inputs.businessContext: Total caffeine consumed in mg within 6 hours before bedtime

label_i18n.fr: Consommation de caféine avant le coucher

businessContext_i18n.en: Total caffeine consumed in mg within 6 hours before bedtime
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatmadan 6 saat içinde tüketilen toplam kafein (mg cinsinden)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Koffeinkonsum in mg innerhalb von 6 Stunden vor dem Schlafengehen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Caféine totale consommée en mg dans les 6 heures avant le coucher

inputs.label: Screen Time Before Bed
inputs.businessContext: Minutes spent on screens (phone, TV, computer) before lights out

businessContext_i18n.en: Minutes spent on screens (phone, TV, computer) before lights out
businessContext_i18n.tr: Işıklar kapatılmadan önce ekranlarda (telefon, TV, bilgisayar) geçirilen dakika
businessContext_i18n.de: Minuten, die vor dem Ausschalten des Lichts vor Bildschirmen (Telefon, Fernseher, Computer) verbracht werden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Minutes passées sur les écrans (téléphone, TV, ordinateur) avant l'extinction des lumières

inputs.label: Room Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Bedroom temperature in degrees Celsius; optimal is around 20°C

businessContext_i18n.en: Bedroom temperature in degrees Celsius; optimal is around 20°C
businessContext_i18n.de: Schlafzimmertemperatur in Grad Celsius; optimal liegt bei etwa 20°C
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température de la chambre en degrés Celsius ; optimale autour de 20°C

inputs.label: Stress Level (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Self-reported stress level on a scale of 1-10, 10 being extremely stressed

businessContext_i18n.en: Self-reported stress level on a scale of 1-10, 10 being extremely stressed
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1-10 ölçeğinde kendi bildirilen stres seviyesi, 10 aşırı stresli
businessContext_i18n.de: Selbstberichtetes Stresslevel auf einer Skala von 1-10, wobei 10 extrem gestresst bedeutet
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de stress auto-déclaré sur une échelle de 1 à 10, 10 étant extrêmement stressé

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
